scanQr.title: Point at the QR code
scanQr.infoBadge: Where do I find the QR code?
scanQr.helpButton: Where do I find the QR code?

helpScanQr.title: What is the QR code for?
helpScanQr.description:
With a QR code you can quickly:
continue setting up a new product from the web or email,
link your app to your existing accounts at MONETA

continueFromWeb.title: Continue from the web or email
continueFromWeb.description: Did a QR code appear when setting up a product, or did you receive one by email? Simply scan it and continue in Smart Banka.

linkWithIB.title: Link with Internet Banking
linkWithIB.description:
If you already have an account with us, you can link Smart Banka to it via Internet Banking. Log in at ib.moneta.cz, select Settings in the top menu and then Smart Banka on the left. Then scan the displayed code.

If you are activating Smart Banka for the first time, you need to accept the terms of use first.

linkWithSB.title: Link with another Smart Banka
linkWithSB.description:
If you already use Smart Banka on another device (phone, tablet), open it, go to More in the menu, then Your profile and Device management. Tap Add another device. The activation code will then appear on the active device.
Then tap Scan QR code.

loginQrWarning.title: It looks like you are scanning a sign-in QR code
loginQrWarning.description: To pair your device, please sign in first and follow the instructions.

devicePairing.title: Link the child's device via QR code

steps.installApp: Install the Smart Banka app and open it
steps.selectScanQr: On the home screen, tap Scan QR code in the top left corner
steps.enterCode: Scan or type the activation code shown above into the child's device

twoDocumentsPairing.title: Prepare your documents and follow the instructions
steps: Follow the instructions and scan both documents one by one.

otherDevicePairing.title: Prepare your original device and follow the instructions
steps: Go to your original device with Smart Banka and sign in
Open the menu More --> Settings and profile --> Connect a new device
Keep the screen with the {ts1}**QR code with the "pairing" symbol**{/ts1} open
On this device, tap the button below and point the camera {ts2}**at the QR code**{/ts2}
otherDevicePairing.scanButton: Scan QR code with the "pairing" symbol
